text.text: Create and edit products locally, then sync into the selected XA storefront catalog.
One per image (pipe, comma, or newline)
Run this console locally so it can read your image files.
Images must be JPG/PNG/WebP and at least 1600px on the shortest edge.
Use a new upload link for each submission.
Paste the one-time upload link you were given
Catalog publish target is not configured for this environment. Set XA_CATALOG_CONTRACT_BASE_URL and XA_CATALOG_CONTRACT_
